plugins.name: sommelier
plugins.description: Verification-gated orchestration skills (PRD + file-scoped parallel tickets, tier-paired, evidence-gated). Self-tested across five rounds, all published: verification rule beats placebo at catching certified bugs (0%->44% (sonnet) / 29% (haiku), hidden-tests, sonnet p~6e-8); tier-routing ~19% cheaper than all-Opus; parallel ~1.75x slower (single run) on small tasks.
